showImportDialog.name: Show Welcome Dialog
showImportDialog.hint: Show the welcome splash screen when loading a world. Disable this if you don't want to be prompted.

debugMode.name: Debug Mode
debugMode.hint: Enable debug logging to the browser console.

customizeLogin.label: Customize Login Screen
customizeLogin.hint: Update the world login page with Harbinger House artwork and description

displayJournal.label: Display Getting Started Journal
displayJournal.hint: Open the adventure's introductory journal after import

activateScene.label: Activate Starting Scene
activateScene.hint: Set the First Floor map as the active scene after import

errors.pf2eRequired: This module requires the Pathfinder 2e system.
